'''potazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabless|cabless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabless|cabless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| potazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:potazithi|potazithi]] || [[word:potaziji|potaziji]] || [[word:potazishi|potazishi]] || [[word:potaziki|potaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:potazuthuthu|potazuthuthu]] || [[word:potazujuju|potazujuju]] || [[word:potazushushu|potazushushu]] || [[word:potazukuku|potazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:potazuthu|potazuthu]] || [[word:potazuju|potazuju]] || [[word:potazushu|potazushu]] || [[word:potazuku|potazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:potazufthuf|potazufthuf]] || [[word:potazufjuf|potazufjuf]] || [[word:potazufshuf|potazufshuf]] || [[word:potazufkuf|potazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:potazethe|potazethe]] || [[word:potazeje|potazeje]] || [[word:potazeshe|potazeshe]] || [[word:potazeke|potazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:potazothotho|potazothotho]] || [[word:potazojojo|potazojojo]] || [[word:potazoshosho|potazoshosho]] || [[word:potazokoko|potazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:potazotho|potazotho]] || [[word:potazojo|potazojo]] || [[word:potazosho|potazosho]] || [[word:potazoko|potazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:potazofthof|potazofthof]] || [[word:potazofjof|potazofjof]] || [[word:potazofshof|potazofshof]] || [[word:potazofkof|potazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:potazÃŸfthÃŸf|potazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfjÃŸf|potazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfshÃŸf|potazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfkÃŸf|potazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:potazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|potazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|potazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|potazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|potazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:potazÃŸfthÃŸf|potazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfjÃŸf|potazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfshÃŸf|potazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfkÃŸf|potazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:potazÃŸfthÃŸf|potazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfjÃŸf|potazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfshÃŸf|potazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:potazÃŸfkÃŸf|potazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:potazÃḊthÃḊ|potazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:potazÃḊjÃḊ|potazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:potazÃḊshÃḊ|potazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:potazÃḊkÃḊ|potazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:potazathatha|potazathatha]] || [[word:potazajaja|potazajaja]] || [[word:potazashasha|potazashasha]] || [[word:potazakaka|potazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:potazatha|potazatha]] || [[word:potazaja|potazaja]] || [[word:potazasha|potazasha]] || [[word:potazaka|potazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:potazafthaf|potazafthaf]] || [[word:potazafjaf|potazafjaf]] || [[word:potazafshaf|potazafshaf]] || [[word:potazafkaf|potazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:potazasha|potazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:potazshÃḋsha|potazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:potazrosha|potazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:potazmusha|potazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:potazyasha|potazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopotaznkshÃḋsha|gopotaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopotaznkrosha|gopotaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopotaznkmusha|gopotaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopotaznkyasha|gopotaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:potatazasha|potatazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:potatazshÃḋsha|potatazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:potatazrosha|potatazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:potatazmusha|potatazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:potatazyasha|potatazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopotataznkshÃḋsha|gopotataznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopotataznkrosha|gopotataznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopotataznkmusha|gopotataznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopotataznkyasha|gopotataznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:petÃḊzasha|petÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:petÃḊzshÃḋsha|petÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:petÃḊzrosha|petÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:petÃḊzmusha|petÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:petÃḊzyasha|petÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopetÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gopetÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopetÃḊznkrosha|gopetÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopetÃḊznkmusha|gopetÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopetÃḊznkyasha|gopetÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:potfazasha|potfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:potfazshÃḋsha|potfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:potfazrosha|potfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:potfazmusha|potfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:potfazyasha|potfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopotfaznkshÃḋsha|gopotfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopotfaznkrosha|gopotfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopotfaznkmusha|gopotfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopotfaznkyasha|gopotfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
